title: Prism Pop
description: A single-level match-3 puzzle game focused on juicy visual feedback. Players swap adjacent jewels on an 8x8 grid to form matches of 3 or more, earning points toward a 2500-point win target.

interactions.description: Adjacent tiles can be swapped by the player. If the swap forms a match of 3+, matched tiles are destroyed. If no match, tiles snap back to original positions.
Tiles are contained within the grid. After matches, tiles above empty spaces fall down (gravity) and new tiles spawn at the top.
Shards are visual-only particles that do not interact with the grid.
Shards pass through tiles without interaction.
Shards do not interact with the score UI.
Tile matches add points to score. 3-match: 300pts, 4-match: 500pts, 5-match: 1000pts.
Shards do not interact with each other.

invariants.name: grid_always_full
invariants.description: The 8x8 grid must always have exactly 64 tiles after gravity fill completes.

invariants.name: score_monotonic
invariants.description: Score can only increase, never decrease.

invariants.name: tile_type_valid
invariants.description: Tile type must be one of 5 valid jewel types (0=Ruby, 1=Sapphire, 2=Emerald, 3=Topaz, 4=Amethyst).

invariants.name: tile_within_grid
invariants.description: Tile grid x-position must be within 0-7.

invariants.name: tile_within_grid_y
invariants.description: Tile grid y-position must be within 0-7.

degenerate_states.name: no_valid_moves
degenerate_states.description: No valid swaps exist on the board. The grid should be reshuffled to prevent a deadlocked state.

degenerate_states.name: score_overflow
degenerate_states.description: Score exceeds the maximum displayable value.

degenerate_states.name: infinite_cascade
degenerate_states.description: A match cascade exceeds 20 steps, suggesting an infinite loop in match/fill logic.

win_condition: Player reaches 2500 points. Upon reaching the target, the game freezes for 0.5 seconds (Big Freeze), all remaining tiles explode, and a Level Complete screen is shown.
